mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_tbl1 (member_id, member_pw, member_name, member_grade, member_nickname, member_email, member_thumb, enroll_date, member_status, manner_score, trade_count) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, 2, #{memberNickname}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberThumb}, SYSDATE, 0, 0, 0)
mapper.select: select member_id from member_tbl1 where member_email = #{memberEmail} fetch first 1 row only
select member_id, member_name, member_email, enroll_date, member_grade, member_status from member_tbl1
select count(*) as memberCount, sum(nvl(member_co2, 0)) as totalCo2 from member_tbl1 where member_status <> 2 and nvl(member_co2, 0) > 0
select member_name, member_nickname, member_email, member_thumb, member_co2 AS memberCo2, enroll_date, member_status from member_tbl1 where member_id = #{memberId}
select member_pw from member_tbl1 where member_id =#{memberId}
mapper.update: update member_tbl1 set member_pw=#{memberPw} where member_id = #{memberId}
update member_tbl1 set member_thumb=#{memberThumb} where member_id = #{memberId}
update member_tbl1 set member_status = 2 where member_id =#{memberId}
mapper.insert: insert into member_log_tbl (member_log_no, member_id, log_ip, log_time, log_action, log_device, log_result, log_location, log_detail, log_alert) values ( log_seq.nextval, #{memberId}, #{logIp}, sysdate, #{logAction}, #{logDevice}, #{logResult}, #{logLocation}, #{logDetail}, #{logAlert} )
mapper.select: select * from ( select log_location from member_log_tbl where member_id = #{memberId} and log_action = '로그인' order by log_time desc ) where rownum <= 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_log_tbl WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND log_action = '로그인실패' AND log_time > SYSDATE - (1/1440)
mapper.update: update member_tbl1 set lock_until = sysdate + (5/1440), lock_reason = '로그인 3회 실패로 일시정지 되었습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도해주세요' where member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: select member_thumb, member_nickname, member_co2 from member_tbl1 where member_co2 is not null and member_id != 'admin00' order by member_co2 desc offset 0 rows fetch next 15 rows only

SELECT POINT_NO AS pointNo, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, POINT_CHANGE AS pointChange, POINT_TYPE AS pointType, POINT_REASON AS pointReason, TO_CHAR(CREATED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdDate FROM POINT_TBL WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY POINT_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POINT_TBL ( POINT_NO, MEMBER_ID, POINT_CHANGE, POINT_TYPE, POINT_REASON, CREATED_DATE ) VALUES ( POINT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{pointChange}, #{pointType}, #{pointReason}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: update member_tbl1 set member_status = 0 where member_status = 3 and lock_until <= sysdate
